title: Kim Scott: Eric Ries Joining Radical Candor Podcast
summary: Radical Candor author Kim Scott announces Eric Ries is joining her podcast next week, calling Incorruptible one of the most important books she's read in the last decade.
blockquote: Eric Ries has a new book coming out, and I've been thinking about it since I read it. It's one of the most important books I've read in the last decade. The argument is deceptively simple: companies don't fail their missions because of bad people. They fail because of bad structures.
attribution_title: Co-founder of Radical Candor; NYT Bestselling Author
